TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Yuwhbun_raka, title = Yuwhbun_raka, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yuwhbun_raka} }

S.FORM: Yuwhbun raka Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Yuwhbun raka a niyaro', 43 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 117 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 90% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 105 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 10% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 12 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal86%, Amis2%, roma2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: jo~u~uwħb~b~vo~u~un raka itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u jo~u~uwħb~b~vo~u~un raka a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Yuwhbun raka Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Yuwhbun raka a niyaro', 43 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 117 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 90% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 105 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 10% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 12 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal86%, Amis2%, roma2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: jo~u~uwħb~b~vo~u~un raka itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u jo~u~uwħb~b~vo~u~un raka a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
